steps.title: Price the first people
steps.content:
The first $30$ people cost $26$ dollars each, so that fixed charge is
$$30(26)=780$$

steps.title: Add extra people
steps.content:
For $n\ge30$, there are $n-30$ additional people. Each additional person costs $18$ dollars.
$$780+18(n-30)=780+18n-540=18n+240$$
The answer is A.
